| CU-003 | 51 months | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | 2.826 mg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

- **Inference:** Based on this config alone, the dosing setup looks internally consistent.
- **Limitation:** I **can’t confirm full PK model operational stability** from this file alone, because it doesn’t include current runtime, validation, or monitoring outputs.
